audit_phase_1.scope: Static cross-reference of source_registry_status.csv against scripts/ tree, run_all.py imports, and data/staging/processed/ disk contents. No module execution. No master rebuild.

critical_anomalies.description: Source registry marks these as fully_materialized, but their producer scripts (scripts/download_cdbg_dr.py, scripts/download_slfrf.py) are NOT imported by run_all.py and no declared outputs exist on disk in this clone. The materialization claim is unverifiable from the automated pipeline.
critical_anomalies.remediation: Either wire the producers into run_all.py and execute, or downgrade the registry status to not_materialized and document the actual provenance (e.g., one-off operator run).

critical_anomalies.description: Registry marks these fully_materialized and the producers ARE wired into run_all.py, but no declared output files exist in data/staging/processed/ in this clone. Consistent with a code-only repo (data .gitignored or generated elsewhere), but means the claim cannot be verified locally.
critical_anomalies.remediation: Confirm whether materialization happens out-of-band (CI, separate data volume). If so, document the provenance in source_registry_status.csv blocker_notes. If not, the claim should be downgraded.

critical_anomalies.description: Declared 2 outputs (pr_subawards_master.csv + execution/execution_chain_master.csv); only execution_chain_master.csv is on disk. Primary subaward master is missing.
critical_anomalies.remediation: Re-run scripts/download_subawards.py to regenerate the primary output, or split the source_id so that subaward materialization and execution-chain derivation are tracked independently.

critical_anomalies.description: Producer scripts exist on disk but are NOT imported into run_all.py. These sources will never materialize through the automated pipeline.
critical_anomalies.remediation: Decide per source: wire into run_all.py if intended, or drop from source_registry_status.csv if abandoned.

filesystem_observation.interpretation: This clone contains code only; the canonical pr_*_master.csv outputs declared across 82 registry entries are absent. Any 'master row count' reported elsewhere (e.g., the 4,503-row pr_all_awards_master figure flagged earlier) cannot be verified from this working tree.
